---
title: "St. Andrew\'s College, Kohimarama"
---

## St. Andrew\'s College, Kohimarama

**Type:** organization

### About

Founded by the Rev. John Coleridge Patteson in 1859 at the place now called Mission Bay, Auckland, as a school for boys and girls from the South Sea Islands.  It was named after the church of St. Andrew in <i>The Daisy Chain</i> and was built with CMY\'s donations from the profits of that novel.  However, it only lasted a short time in Auckland, which was too cold for the pupils, and removed to Norfolk Island. The missionaries had second thoughts about the name.  The building is currently (2007) occupied by a cafe.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
